description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for VMware vSphere/ESXi environments via esxport Prometheus exporter. Tracks hosts, VMs, datastores, clusters, resource pools, snapshots, and exporter health.

links.title: esxport on GitHub
links.tooltip: View esxport source code and documentation

panels.description: Total number of ESXi hosts discovered by the exporter
panels.title: Total Hosts

panels.description: Total number of virtual machines across all hosts
panels.title: Total VMs

panels.description: Number of VMs currently in powered-on state
panels.title: Powered-On VMs

panels.description: Total number of datastores discovered across all hosts
panels.title: Total Datastores

panels.description: CPU utilization percentage per host over time. Thresholds: >70% yellow, >85% red
panels.title: Host CPU Usage %

panels.description: Memory utilization percentage per host over time. Thresholds: >70% yellow, >85% red
panels.title: Host Memory Usage %

panels.description: Number of physical network interface cards (NICs) per ESXi host
panels.title: Host NIC Count

panels.description: Time since last boot for each ESXi host, displayed in human-readable format
panels.title: Host Uptime

panels.description: Count of ESXi hosts currently in powered-on state
panels.title: Host Power State

panels.description: CPU consumption in MHz per virtual machine over time
panels.title: VM CPU Usage

panels.description: Active memory usage in bytes per virtual machine over time
panels.title: VM Memory Usage

panels.description: Power state of each VM: On (green) or Off (red). Use to quickly identify stopped VMs
panels.title: VM Power States

panels.description: Total disk space consumed by each virtual machine including all attached disks
panels.title: VM Disk Usage

panels.description: Distribution of virtual machines by guest operating system type
panels.title: Guest OS Breakdown

panels.description: Inbound network throughput (bytes/sec) per VM, calculated as 5-minute rate
panels.title: VM Network RX

panels.description: Outbound network throughput (bytes/sec) per VM, calculated as 5-minute rate
panels.title: VM Network TX

panels.description: Datastore total capacity vs free space. Blue bars = capacity, green bars = free space
panels.title: Datastore Usage

panels.description: Percentage of each datastore's capacity currently in use. Thresholds: >70% yellow, >85% red
panels.title: Datastore Utilization %

panels.description: Number of ESXi hosts in each vSphere cluster
panels.title: Cluster Host Count

panels.description: Total CPU capacity in MHz aggregated per cluster
panels.title: Cluster CPU Total

panels.description: Total memory capacity aggregated per cluster
panels.title: Cluster Memory Total

panels.description: CPU usage in MHz per resource pool over time
panels.title: Resource Pool CPU Usage

panels.description: Maximum CPU allocation limit for each resource pool (-1 = unlimited)
panels.title: Resource Pool CPU Limit

panels.description: Memory usage in bytes per resource pool over time
panels.title: Resource Pool Memory Usage

panels.description: Maximum memory allocation limit for each resource pool (-1 = unlimited)
panels.title: Resource Pool Memory Limit

panels.description: Guaranteed minimum CPU allocation (MHz) reserved for each resource pool
panels.title: Resource Pool CPU Reservation

panels.description: Guaranteed minimum memory allocation reserved for each resource pool
panels.title: Resource Pool Memory Reservation

panels.description: Exporter scrape health status: Up (green) = successful, Down (red) = failed
panels.title: Scrape Success

panels.description: Time taken to complete each vSphere API scrape. Thresholds: >10s yellow, >30s red
panels.title: Scrape Duration

panels.description: Cumulative count of scrape errors. Thresholds: >0 yellow, >10 red
panels.title: Scrape Errors Total

panels.description: Table of VMs that currently have snapshots. High snapshot counts (>5) highlighted red
panels.title: VMs with Snapshots

panels.description: Age of the oldest snapshot per VM. Snapshots older than 1 day yellow, 1 week orange, 30 days red
panels.title: Oldest Snapshot Age

title: esxport - VMware vSphere Overview
